name: The Forge-Heart
description: At the very bottom of the Emberdeep lies a cathedral of fire, a domed chamber ringed by falls of liquid rock that pour endlessly into a central well of blinding molten light. The heat is a physical wall, and the roar of the flames swallows all other sound. This is the furnace at the root of the mountain, and it is not empty: something vast and burning has made its throne upon the forge-heart itself.
ambient_messages: The molten falls surge and thunder, and the whole chamber pulses a deeper, angrier red.
A wave of heat rolls out from the central well, fierce enough to steal the breath from your lungs.
Deep in the fire something enormous draws a long, rasping breath, and the flames lean toward it.
